cloakbrowser_status: CloakBrowser 0.3.31 LAUNCHED successfully after extracting libnspr4.so from debian package and setting LD_LIBRARY_PATH. Fingerprint and anti-bot patches active — but datacenter IP still gets blocked by aggressive Cloudflare configs.

results.reason: Aggressive Cloudflare WAF blocks datacenter IPs regardless of browser fingerprint quality. CloakBrowser passes fingerprint checks but the IP is flagged.
results.recommendation: Qasem must submit manually from residential IP browser

results.reason: Same as Dough Roller — Cloudflare IP-level block. Browser fingerprint quality doesn't matter when the IP is flagged.
results.recommendation: Qasem must submit manually from residential IP browser

results.reason: No general contact form exists on this site. Only a mortgage rate lead-gen form which would be inappropriate for outreach.
